angle: Variation 1 — asymmetric crop with focal point on upper-left rule-of-thirds intersection. Headline in a color-block field in the lower-third. Maximum restraint.
subject: HOMBRE Old Fashioned
prompt:
A social media image for Blue Mezcal, nocturnal after-dark register. Brand palette: charred black #0B0B0B, brass #C9A24B, velvet burgundy #4A1621, smoke gray #2A2825, warm white #EDE4D3. Typography: refined editorial serif italic (Bodoni / Canela feel) paired with small-caps grotesque, brass foil detail. Texture: 35mm Portra 800 grain, velvet surfaces, brass foil accents, rich shadows. Photography style: moody low-light, tungsten 2700K, single rim light from upper-right at 45°, deep blacks, 60%+ negative space. Insider bar at 11pm. Editorial moody-nocturnal restraint.

FORMAT: Moody beverage spotlight. Single rim-lit cocktail glass, black or charred background, hand entering frame optionally. Type integrated as if printed on the menu, not overlaid as a sticker.

COMPOSITION: 3/4 macro shot, 85mm equivalent at f/2.8, single rim light from upper-right at 45°, tungsten 2800K, Portra 800 grain, focus on rim and garnish

HEADLINE (quote exactly as written, no paraphrasing, no misspellings): "HOMBRE Old Fashioned"
SUPPORT LINE (quote exactly): "Branded ice cube. Bourbon underneath."
ADDRESS / CTA (small, bottom margin, low-key): "826 Kohl Ave · Middletown, DE — Visit us · link in bio"
WORDMARK (small, one corner, 40–80px equivalent, 50–70% opacity): "BLUE MEZCAL"

VARIATION DIRECTION: Variation 1 — asymmetric crop with focal point on upper-left rule-of-thirds intersection. Headline in a color-block field in the lower-third. Maximum restraint.

PHOTO RULE: The reference food photograph supplied as input MUST be composited into the design as-is. DO NOT regenerate, restyle, or alter the plating, lighting, colours, or contents of the food in any way. Treat the photo as a fixed element that the template is built AROUND. Place the exact supplied photo into the photo region of the composition. Design only the surrounding typography, colour fields, motifs, negative space, and composition.

FINAL: Render at the aspect ratio specified via the API (not in prose). Dense typography with purpose. Real brand register. No stock gradients, no Canva-template feel. Avoid the AI tells: no cyan-to-magenta gradients, no default Poppins/Montserrat/Open Sans, no 33/33/33 colour balance, no centered dead-symmetric layouts unless ceremonial, no default 5px 90° drop shadows. Texture with intent: noise/grain overlay, paper, halftone, risograph where register calls for it.

angle: Variation 2 — wider framing with 60–70% negative space. Headline and sub in upper-third, photo anchored to lower-half. Editorial magazine spread feel.
